title: Venge.io
description: Venge.io is a fast‑paced, browser-based 3D multiplayer first‑person shooter developed with PlayCanvas by OnRush Studio. Players battle in team or solo modes across fantasy-themed arenas, choosing from 4 unique heroes and a variety of weapons and abilities.
instructions: WASD – move • LMB – shoot • RMB or Shift – aim down sights • Space – jump • Scroll wheel or keys 1‑9 – cycle weapons • R – reload • E – melee attack • F or G – throw grenade • Hold B – activate hero card (ability/spell) • H – emote/dance • Esc – leaderboard
tags: Browser, WebGL, Multiplayer, Hero Shooter, FPS, .io, Free‑to‑play

features.controls: Keyboard and mouse with optional gamepad support
